# Jonathon Plumb — AI Solutions Engineer

> Portfolio of Jon Plumb: production generative-AI and agentic systems.
> Building with LLMs since the GPT-3 era. Detroit, MI. US citizen, open to
> remote (US) roles — no sponsorship needed.

This site hosts Hermes Concierge, an AI assistant (bottom-right chat widget)
grounded in a verified knowledge base about Jon. Recruiters can ask it
anything — work authorization, availability, project depth — or paste a full
job description and it maps Jon's experience against the requirements point
by point. The assistant is itself one of Jon's builds: serverless,
guardrailed, provider-fallback-routed, structurally cost-capped.

## Projects

- [Nitruz](https://nitruz.com): AI vehicle photography SaaS for auto dealerships — live, pre-launch
- [ResumeAye](https://resume-aye.onrender.com/): freemium AI resume-tailoring SaaS — live
- [The Lab](https://jonplumb-dev.netlify.app/#work): hardened multi-machine AI lab running Hermes, a self-hosted multi-agent platform (MCP, Claude, Ollama fallback)

- [Email](mailto:jon.plumb89@outlook.com): jon.plumb89@outlook.com
